cnv.name: cnv

SVG export draws its own inline legend. Rebuilt + regenerated + verified legend now reads above the separators.

sv_cgiab/cnv_log2ratio_genome.name: sv_cgiab/cnv_log2ratio_genome
sv_cgiab/cnv_log2ratio_genome.note: the multiwiggle depth should ideally be raw depths not indexcov. can use aws cli to 'aws s3 ls' in cgiab demos folder if it helps. we can also consider using a production grade cnv detector like cnvpytor or an R tool or something to get the best signal to plot. we may not want to do that now because we cant access our labserver to run analysis. we may want to make this screenshot wider. the baf values are also probably confusing for anyone without proper background, and the 'whiskers' are confusing too. also we are not plotting folded b-allele frequency anymore

sv_cgiab/driver_cdkn2a_deletion.name: sv_cgiab/driver_cdkn2a_deletion
sv_cgiab/driver_cdkn2a_deletion.note: Applied heightMode:fit so the ~116x pileup packs into the fixed height without clipping. "Sort split reads to bottom" was not applied -- confirmed with the user there is no sort/group-by option that supports it while linkedReads chain mode is on (a chain's members must share one group key; "is-part-of-a-chain" is not a groupable dimension).

maf_codon_tooltip.note: tracklabels:offset + colorByCDS:true + longestCoding gene track; regenerated

gc_content.name: gc_content
gc_content.note: FIXED: root-caused — LinearGCContentTrackDisplay/LinearGCContentDisplay inherited summaryScoreMode:whiskers from LinearWiggleDisplay, and buildSourceRenderData skips the bicolor pos/neg split entirely in whiskers mode (posColor only), so GC skew rendered monochrome despite useBicolor/bicolorPivot already defaulting correctly. GCContentAdapter never emits real per-bin min/max, so whiskers mode was pointless there anyway — defaulted summaryScoreMode to avg in both display config schemas. Skew now shows the real two-arm blue/red replichore profile. Replication-fork annotation left as a follow-up.

feature_height_default_pin.name: feature_height_default_pin
feature_height_default_pin.note: FIXED: rewrote the robotic blurb ("un-pinned tracks follow") into plain language.

gallery/fiberseq_gapdh.name: gallery/fiberseq_gapdh
gallery/fiberseq_gapdh.note: FIXED+regen: zoom out, longestCoding genes, shorter promoter/ATAC lanes, 6mA-only legend; caption provenance added.

gallery/hg002_dipcall.name: gallery/hg002_dipcall
gallery/hg002_dipcall.note: DONE: trackLabels:offset + shortened track names in config_demo; both hap rows visible, mismatch patterns differ (not all-hom)

gallery/hg19_vs_hg38.name: gallery/hg19_vs_hg38
gallery/hg19_vs_hg38.note: chr11-before-chr10 / chrX-mid-list was the size-sorted chrom.sizes order, not autodiagonalize. Fixed: karyotype-ordered main-chromosome-only chrom.sizes for both hg19+hg38 (test_data), autoDiagonalize off, config sample-data cleaned too. Clean diagonal, natural chr1..22,X,Y on both axes, alt-contig clutter gone. Spec now uses sessionSpec() helper + plain JSON.

gallery/human_mito.name: gallery/human_mito
gallery/human_mito.note: Zoomed from the whole-genome overview to MT-ND3 (NC_012920.1:9,950-10,550) — shortest mt protein-coding gene, one of six whose stop codon is completed by polyadenylation (transl_except in the Note field).

gallery/scatac_catlas.name: gallery/scatac_catlas
gallery/scatac_catlas.note: Moved to the INS (insulin) promoter, chr11:2,158,000-2,163,000 — a clean beta-cell-restricted accessibility peak vs the other 15 cell types. Display height 500->320, viewportHeight 700->500.

gallery/yeast_dotplot.name: gallery/yeast_dotplot
gallery/yeast_dotplot.note: SATISFIED: autoDiagonalize:true already in spec, PNG shows clean main diagonal.

introgression.name: introgression
introgression.note: Increased viewportHeight and moved the caption below the LGV panel entirely (was overlapping the track rows).

introgression_locus.name: introgression_locus
introgression_locus.note: Zoomed out (600kb -> 1.2Mb), shortened the caption, added why-it-matters framing (Melanesians carry the most Denisovan ancestry of any population) plus a citation (Vernot et al. 2016, Science), and moved the caption below the panel.

inversion_long_read.name: inversion_long_read
inversion_long_read.note: FIXED: dropped the short-read (Illumina) track and its annotations, kept only the Nanopore long-read track + VCF, widened loc 3.3kb -> 5.5kb, and shrunk viewportHeight to match.

methylation/chromatin_accessibility_6ma.name: methylation/chromatin_accessibility_6ma
methylation/chromatin_accessibility_6ma.note: Follow-up per user: hiddenModifications:[m,h] so only 6mA (a) renders/legends; also fixed a real bug where hiddenModifications filtered what rendered but not the legend swatches (legendUtils.ts). Also fixed a stale capture (was committed mid-download, progress bars baked in) by raising settleMs 20000->45000.

multiway_synteny/ecoli_import_form.name: multiway_synteny/ecoli_import_form
multiway_synteny/ecoli_import_form.note: DONE: cropped out the confusing right-hand 'Synteny dataset between rows' panel + shortened both blurbs ('Pick your all-vs-all track' / 'Every assembly becomes a row, then Launch')

synteny_human_chimp_cigar_modes.name: synteny_human_chimp_cigar_modes
synteny_human_chimp_cigar_modes.note: FIXED: RepeatMasker labels now visible (L1HS labeled at the RB1 insertion, absent in chimp) via heightMode grow — normal-height, compact, no decimation. Addresses "make the repeat masker labels visible".

synteny_te_vapb_sva.name: synteny_te_vapb_sva
synteny_te_vapb_sva.note: FIXED: RepeatMasker heightMode fit->grow — repeats now render at NORMAL feature height (no fit-scaling inflation), the track auto-sizes compactly to the few rows, and every name is drawn (SVA_F at the insertion) with no fit-ladder decimation. (Corrected from the earlier fit:110 which the reviewer flagged as weirdly tall + label-decimating.)

synteny_te_picalm_alu.name: synteny_te_picalm_alu
synteny_te_picalm_alu.note: FIXED: RepeatMasker heightMode grow — normal-height compact repeats with all labels (AluYb8 human-specific insertion labeled, absent in chimp); no inflation, no decimation. Per reviewer: "normal height... compact, but still showing labels".

cookbook_color_by_strand.name: cookbook_color_by_strand
cookbook_color_by_strand.note: please use hg38 with ncbi gff

popgen/fst_in2lt_2L.name: popgen/fst_in2lt_2L
popgen/fst_in2lt_2L.note: FIXED: replotted genome-wide (all 6 dm6 arms) so 2L’s elevated Fst stands out as anomalous against low background on every other arm (reviewer: plot genome-wide vs background).

popgen/pi_cyp6g1.name: popgen/pi_cyp6g1
popgen/pi_cyp6g1.note: FIXED: zoomed out to ~3Mb so the diversity dip reads against background; replaced the misplaced text-anchored box with a genomic Cyp6g1 highlight band + repositioned callout.

qtl/bxd_overview.name: qtl/bxd_overview
qtl/bxd_overview.note: FIXED: viewportHeight 820->980 so the full 198-strain chromosome-painting track clears the bottom crop instead of running off-frame.

qtl/bxd_tyrp1_locus.name: qtl/bxd_tyrp1_locus
qtl/bxd_tyrp1_locus.note: FIXED: zoomed out to ~14Mb (chr4:74-88M) so the QTL peak reads as a full rise-and-fall; viewportHeight->1060 (painting no longer clipped); added a visible red Tyrp1 highlight band + callout so the gene is identifiable at this scale.

encode_hic_loops_arcs.name: encode_hic_loops_arcs
encode_hic_loops_arcs.note: FIXED: gene track showOnlyGenes (clean gene models), hid the Hi-C resolution-controls box + enabled log scale, and score-filtered the EPIraction enhancer arcs (score>=500 via color jexl) so only strong links show instead of a hairball.

sv_synteny/linear_synteny_genes_colored.name: sv_synteny/linear_synteny_genes_colored
sv_synteny/linear_synteny_genes_colored.note: FIXED: regenerated — showOnlyGenes gives clean per-gene colored glyphs (orthologs same hue across strains) and drawCurves renders curved synteny ribbons; both were already in the spec, the committed PNG was stale.
